05/13/2026
Order Granting Motion for Continuance
Trial of the claim filed by Aperion Care set for May 19, 2026 at 2:00 pm is continued. The parties may file a stipulation to the appointment of a mediator by May 18, 2026. Failure to agree, the Court appoints the following panel for alternate striking with the Claimant to strike first.
